ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "content" TEXT /* Full text content of the document */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "document_category" TEXT /* Category of the document */,
  "document_source" TEXT /* Source of the document */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Current status of the document */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the document was last modified */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Keywords or tags associated with the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "term" TEXT /* The term itself */,
  "term_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the term based on analysis */,
  "term_score" INTEGER /* Score assigned to the term based on its importance */,
  "term_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the term across all documents */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the term is extracted from */,
  "term_type" TEXT /* Type of term (e.g., noun, verb, adjective) */,
  "sentiment_score" INTEGER /* Sentiment score of the term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_terms_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "n_grams" (
  "ngram_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each n-gram */,
  "ngram" TEXT /* The n-gram extracted from the document */,
  "ngram_length" INTEGER /* Length of the n-gram (e.g., bigram, trigram) */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of occurrence of the n-gram in documents */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the n-gram is extracted from */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context in which the n-gram appears */,
  "sentiment_score" INTEGER /* Sentiment score of the n-gram */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ngram_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_n_grams_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filters" (
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter */,
  "filter_name" TEXT /* Name of the filter */,
  "filter_type" TEXT /* Type of the filter (e.g., length, frequency) */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria or parameters for the filter */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the filter */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the filter was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the filter was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filters_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document analyzed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  "result_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis results */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis */,
  "analysis_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, analyze) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "n_gram_analysis" (
  "ngram_analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each n-gram analysis result */,
  "ngram_id" INTEGER /* ID of the n-gram being analyzed */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis it is associated with */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank assigned to the n-gram in the analysis */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score assigned to the n-gram based on its analysis */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context in which the n-gram appears in the analysis */,
  "sentiment_score" INTEGER /* Sentiment score of the n-gram in the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ngram_analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_n_gram_analysis_ngram_id FOREIGN KEY ("ngram_id") REFERENCES n_grams ("ngram_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_n_gram_analysis_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analysis_results ("analysis_id")
)
